name: director-iracing
description: Controls iRacing Cameras and Replay state via Broadcast Messages.
aiContext:
The iRacing extension controls Race Director cameras and instant replay playback.
- broadcast.showLiveCam: switches the broadcast camera to follow a specific car. carNum is the car number string (e.g. "64"). camGroup is the numeric iRacing camera group ID from the CAMERA GROUPS list (TV1=11, TV2=12, Chase=20, Blimp=18, PitLane=16). Best combined with obs.switchScene to the Race Director OBS scene first.
- broadcast.replayFromTo: plays an instant replay segment between startFrame and endFrame iRacing replay frame numbers. Use for post-incident reviews only — never use during live racing sequences.
- broadcast.setReplaySpeed: sets replay playback multiplier (e.g. 0.5 = half speed, 2 = double speed). Always follow with a system.wait step.
- broadcast.setReplayPosition: jumps to a specific replay frame number.
- broadcast.setReplayState: sets replay mode. state values: 0 = play, 1 = pause. Use to freeze on a key moment.

intents.title: Show Live Camera
intents.description: Switches the iRacing broadcast camera to follow a specific car. carNum is the car number string (e.g. '64'). camGroup is the numeric iRacing camera group ID from the CAMERA GROUPS list (TV1=11, TV2=12, Chase=20, Blimp=18, PitLane=16). Best combined with obs.switchScene to the Race Director OBS scene first.

intents.title: Play Replay Segment
intents.description: Plays an instant replay segment between startFrame and endFrame iRacing replay frame numbers. Use for post-incident reviews only — never during live racing sequences. speed is optional playback multiplier (default 1).

intents.title: Set Replay Speed
intents.description: Sets replay playback multiplier. speed: 0.5 = half speed, 1 = normal, 2 = double speed. Always follow with a system.wait step.

intents.title: Set Replay Position
intents.description: Jumps to a specific iRacing replay frame number.

intents.title: Set Replay State
intents.description: Sets the iRacing replay mode. state: 0 = play, 1 = pause. Use to freeze on a key frame during an instant replay sequence.

intents.title: Set Publisher Enabled
intents.description: Hot-toggles the telemetry publisher on or off without restarting the app.

intents.title: Register Driver Publisher
intents.description: Registers this rig as a driver publisher for the given race session.

intents.title: Set Session Publisher Enabled
intents.description: Hot-toggles the session publisher pipeline on or off.

intents.title: Set Driver Publisher Enabled
intents.description: Hot-toggles the driver publisher pipeline on or off.

events.title: iRacing Connection Changed
events.description: Emitted when iRacing simulator connection state changes.

events.title: Drivers Changed
events.description: Emitted when the driver list changes (session load, driver join/leave).

events.title: Camera Groups Changed
events.description: Emitted when the list of available camera groups changes (session load/change).

events.title: Race State Changed
events.description: Emitted at 4Hz with live telemetry: car positions, gaps, lap times, pit status, and session flags.

events.title: Publisher State Changed
events.description: Emitted when the iRacing publisher mode changes state (active, idle, error).

events.title: Publisher Event Emitted
events.description: Emitted once per PublisherEvent dispatched to the cloud. Drives the recent-events feed in the iRacing extension panel.

publisher.enabled.description: Enable Publisher mode — POSTs iRacing telemetry events to Race Control.

publisher.publisherCode.description: Unique identifier for this rig (e.g. 'rig-01'). Used to tag all outbound events.

publisher.raceSessionId.description: Race Control session ID to publish events to. Obtain this from Race Control after check-in.

publisher.identityDisplayName.description: Optional display name override for this rig's driver. Leave blank to use the iRacing username.

publisher.batchIntervalMs.description: How often (ms) to flush the event batch. High-priority events bypass this and flush immediately.
